name: livespec-impl-beads
description: Beads/Dolt-backed implementation plugin for livespec. Exposes /livespec-impl-beads:capture-impl-gaps, /livespec-impl-beads:capture-spec-drift, /livespec-impl-beads:capture-work-item, /livespec-impl-beads:detect-impl-gaps, /livespec-impl-beads:implement, /livespec-impl-beads:list-work-items, /livespec-impl-beads:next.
